productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Brown Casual Shoes
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these stylish lifestyle shoes from lee cooper. This shoe is a fresh take on the classic design and will look cool along with any casual outfit. Upper Synthetic uppers for comfort and protection Stitch detailing Lace-ups for snug Fit Looped lace detailing on the sides for enhanced style Leather lining for greater comfort Brand name on the side Mid-sole Cushioned removable sock-liner to accommodate an orthottic Phylon mid-sole for comfort and stability Out-sole Rubber out-sole with wave-like and pentagonal grooves Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust
